speaker: LORD
text: Cam’st thou from where they made the stand?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I did,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Though you, it seems, come from the fliers.

speaker: LORD
text: Ay.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: No blame be to you, sir, for all was lost,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: But that the heavens fought. The King himself

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Of his wings destitute, the army broken,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And but the backs of Britons seen, all flying

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Through a strait lane; the enemy full-hearted,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Lolling the tongue with slaught’ring, having work

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: More plentiful than tools to do ’t, struck down

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Some mortally, some slightly touched, some falling

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Merely through fear, that the strait pass was dammed

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: With dead men hurt behind and cowards living

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To die with lengthened shame.

speaker: LORD
text: Where was this lane?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Close by the battle, ditched, and walled with turf;

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Which gave advantage to an ancient soldier,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: An honest one, I warrant, who deserved

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: So long a breeding as his white beard came to,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: In doing this for ’s country. Athwart the lane,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: He with two striplings—lads more like to run

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The country base than to commit such slaughter,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: With faces fit for masks, or rather fairer

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Than those for preservation cased or shame—

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Made good the passage, cried to those that fled

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: “Our Britain’s harts die flying, not our men.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To darkness fleet souls that fly backwards. Stand,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Or we are Romans and will give you that

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Like beasts which you shun beastly, and may save

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: But to look back in frown. Stand, stand!” These three,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Three thousand confident, in act as many—

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: For three performers are the file when all

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The rest do nothing—with this word “Stand, stand,”

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Accommodated by the place, more charming

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: With their own nobleness, which could have turned

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: A distaff to a lance, gilded pale looks,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Part shame, part spirit renewed; that some, turned coward

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: But by example—O, a sin in war,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Damned in the first beginners!—gan to look

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The way that they did and to grin like lions

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Upon the pikes o’ th’ hunters. Then began

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: A stop i’ th’ chaser, a retire; anon

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: A rout, confusion thick. Forthwith they fly

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Chickens the way which they stooped eagles; slaves

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The strides they victors made; and now our cowards,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Like fragments in hard voyages, became

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The life o’ th’ need. Having found the backdoor open

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Of the unguarded hearts, heavens, how they wound!

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Some slain before, some dying, some their friends

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: O’erborne i’ th’ former wave, ten chased by one,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Are now each one the slaughterman of twenty.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Those that would die or ere resist are grown

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The mortal bugs o’ th’ field.

speaker: LORD
text: This was strange chance:

speaker: LORD
text: A narrow lane, an old man, and two boys.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Nay, do not wonder at it. You are made

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Rather to wonder at the things you hear

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Than to work any. Will you rhyme upon ’t

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And vent it for a mock’ry? Here is one:

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: “Two boys, an old man twice a boy, a lane,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Preserved the Britons, was the Romans’ bane.”

speaker: LORD
text: Nay, be not angry, sir.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: ’Lack, to what end?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Who dares not stand his foe, I’ll be his friend;

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: For if he’ll do as he is made to do,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I know he’ll quickly fly my friendship too.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: You have put me into rhyme.

speaker: LORD
text: Farewell. You’re angry.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Still going? This is a lord! O noble misery,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To be i’ th’ field and ask “What news?” of me!

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Today how many would have given their honors

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To have saved their carcasses, took heel to do ’t,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And yet died too! I, in mine own woe charmed,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Could not find Death where I did hear him groan,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Nor feel him where he struck. Being an ugly monster,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: ’Tis strange he hides him in fresh cups, soft beds,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Sweet words, or hath more ministers than we

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: That draw his knives i’ th’ war. Well, I will find him;

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: For being now a favorer to the Briton,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: No more a Briton.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I have resumed again

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The part I came in. Fight I will no more,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: But yield me to the veriest hind that shall

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Once touch my shoulder. Great the slaughter is

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Here made by th’ Roman; great the answer be

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Britons must take. For me, my ransom’s death.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: On either side I come to spend my breath,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Which neither here I’ll keep nor bear again,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: But end it by some means for Imogen.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              CAPTAIN
text: Great Jupiter be praised, Lucius is taken!

speaker:
FIRST
               
              CAPTAIN
text: ’Tis thought the old man and his sons were angels.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              CAPTAIN
text: There was a fourth man in a silly habit

speaker:
SECOND
               
              CAPTAIN
text: That gave th’ affront with them.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              CAPTAIN
text: So ’tis reported,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              CAPTAIN
text: But none of ’em can be found.—Stand. Who’s there?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: A Roman,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Who had not now been drooping here if seconds

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Had answered him.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              CAPTAIN
text: Lay hands on him. A dog,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              CAPTAIN
text: A leg of Rome shall not return to tell

speaker:
SECOND
               
              CAPTAIN
text: What crows have pecked them here. He brags his service

speaker:
SECOND
               
              CAPTAIN
text: As if he were of note. Bring him to th’ King.
